title_clean: This holy instant would I give to You. Be You in charge. For I would follow You, Certain that Your direction gives me peace.
idea_clean: This holy instant would I give to You. Be You in charge. For I would follow You, Certain that Your direction gives me peace. And if I need a word to help me, He will give it to me. If I need a thought, that will He also give. And if I need but stillness and a tranquil, open mind, these are the gifts I will receive of Him. He is in charge by my request. And He will hear and answer me, because He speaks for God my Father and His holy Son.

practice_instructions.frequency: Twice a day (morning/evening), plus hourly and response to temptation
practice_instructions.description: Morning/evening: Spend quiet time repeating the idea. Throughout the day: Dwell in peace and quietness, remembering Him and calling on His Name when tempted.
